    Method
    Description
    ElfFile.Parser
    ElfFile.Parser.setCharset(Charset charset)
    Sets the charset used to decode and encode ELF string tables.
    ElfFile.Parser
    ElfFile.Parser.setIgnoreSectionErrors(boolean error)
    Enables or disables tolerance for section parsing errors.
